overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive school management system for Indian schools. Fully cPanel/MySQL powered — every add, edit, and delete goes directly to your MySQL database with instant confirmation. All 7 roles (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Accountant, Parent, Student, Driver) have individual login panels with smart dashboards showing only what's relevant to each user. 25+ modules: Students, Fees, Attendance, HR/Payroll, Academics, Examinations, Transport, Library, Inventory, Chat, Communication, Certificates, Reports, Virtual Classes, and more.
features: Role-based login panels — Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Accountant, Parent, Student, Driver each get their own smart dashboard
Ultra-fast online-only architecture — all data saves directly to MySQL via PHP API, no local sync overhead
Students module with Excel-style grid, bulk import, Indian class ordering (Nursery to Class 12)
Fees collection with typeable amount fields, QR receipts, auto month selection, UPI QR payment
Attendance with daily marking, QR scanner, AI face recognition
HR/Payroll with staff directory, payslips, payroll register
Academics, Examinations with online MCQ tests and auto-grading
Transport with GPS tracking, Library with barcode scanning
Communication with WhatsApp broadcast, Certificate Studio, Reports export to Excel
Dark navy sidebar, 10 color themes, PWA installable on phone
Session management with auto-promote students to next academic year
Token auto-refresh — no Session Expired popups
